nasb.text: So He let him alone. At that time she said, “You are a bridegroom of blood”—because of the circumcision.

esv.text: So he let him alone. It was then that she said, “A bridegroom of blood,” because of the circumcision.

cnv.text: 這樣，耶和華才放了他。那時西坡拉說：“你是血郎，是因為割禮的緣故。”

ccb.text: 这样，耶和华才没杀他。当时，西坡拉说“血郎”是指割礼一事。
